classes.description: The System Settings top-level scripting object.
classes.name: application

properties.description: Is System Settings in show-all view? (Setting to false does nothing.) Deprecated: setting this property no longer does anything; it is always set to true.
properties.name: show all

properties.description: The id of the settings pane.
properties.name: id

properties.description: The name of the settings pane.
properties.name: name

classes.description: An anchor within a settings pane.
classes.name: anchor

commands.description: Reveals a settings pane or an anchor within a pane.
commands.name: reveal

commands.description: Prompt for authorization for a settings pane. Deprecated: no longer does anything.
commands.name: authorize

commands.description: Times and loads given settings pane and returns load time. Deprecated: no longer does anything.
commands.name: timedLoad
